data.title: New release: xAI debuts Grok Voice Think Fast 1.0, a top voice AI model for customer support, sales, and enterprise.
data.description: xAI has launched Grok Voice Think Fast 1.0, an advanced voice AI model designed for customer support, sales, and enterprise purposes. This innovative model is equipped with state-of-the-art technology to enhance performance in various applications.

data.title: Cambodian Senator Kok An faces US sanctions for managing a $10B scam network, targeting crypto users with 'pig butchering' tactics.
data.description: Cambodian Senator Kok An has been sanctioned by the US Office of Foreign Assets Control for his involvement in operating fraudulent call centers that led to approximately $10 billion in losses. These centers specifically targeted cryptocurrency users through deceptive schemes known as 'pig butchering'.

data.title: Earnings Scheduled For April 24, 2026
data.description: Before the market opens, several companies are set to report their quarterly earnings. HCA Healthcare (NYSE: HCA) is expected to disclose earnings of $7.16 per share with a revenue of $19.07 billion. Charter Communications (NASDAQ: CHTR) is estimated to report earnings of $9.98 per share on revenue totaling $13.54 billion. SLB (NYSE: SLB) is projected to announce earnings of $0.52 per share with revenue around $8.65 billion. Procter & Gamble (NYSE: PG) is anticipated to reveal earnings of $1.56 per share on revenue of $20.53 billion. Sensient Technologies (NYSE: SXT) is estimated to report earnings of $0.83 per share on revenue amounting to $408.95 million. Rithm Property Trust (NYSE: RPT) is likely to report a quarterly loss of $0.06 per share on revenue of $4.23 million. For additional details, the full coverage is accessible on Benzinga.com.
WiMi announced a net income of RMB 347 million for 2025, a year-on-year increase of 235%

data.title: P&G Announces Fiscal Year 2026 Third Quarter Results
data.description: In Cincinnati, The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) announced a seven percent increase in net sales for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026, totaling $21.2 billion. Organic sales, excluding foreign exchange and acquisitions/divestitures, rose by three percent compared to the previous year. Diluted net earnings per share reached $1.63, marking a six percent increase from the prior year, primarily due to a gain from the dissolution of the Glad joint venture business.

data.title: Treace to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 8, 2026
data.description: In Ponte Vedra, Florida, on April 24, 2026, Treace Medical Concepts, Inc. (NasdaqGS: TMCI) disclosed plans to reveal their financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 before trading commences on Friday, May 8, 2026. This medical technology firm is revolutionizing bunion and midfoot deformities surgeries. A conference call led by company executives is scheduled for 8:00 am ET to delve into the financial results.

data.title: Hexagon Purus ASA: Minutes of Annual General Meeting
data.description: Today, on 24 April 2026, the yearly general gathering of Hexagon Purus ASA took place in Oslo, Norway. All items scheduled on the agenda were accepted according to the initial proposals.
Israel's Prime Minister Netanyahu: Underwent treatment for an early-stage prostate tumor

data.title: Why Is NetApp (NTAP) Stock Trending Overnight
data.description: NetApp Inc. (NASDAQ: NTAP) saw a 0.22% increase in after-hours trading, reaching $112.05, following the announcement of winning the 2026 Google Cloud Infrastructure Modernization Partner of the Year for Storage Award. This marks the seventh time NTAP has received this recognition. Google (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) granted this award to acknowledge partners proficient in aiding customers with migrating to, building on, and enhancing their infrastructure on Google Cloud. Kevin Ichhpurani, a Google Cloud executive, expressed pride in presenting NetApp with the 2026 Google Cloud Partner Award for their contributions to customer success. Pravjit Tiwana, NetApp's senior VP and GM of Cloud Storage, emphasized the significance of this award for customers.

data.title: Bruker Announces Date and Time of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Webcast
data.description: In BILLERICA, Massachusetts, Bruker Corporation (Nasdaq: BRKR) revealed plans to release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, prior to the market opening. The firm will conduct a conference call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to analyze the results and discuss current business trends. Those interested can access the webcast at https://ir.bruker.com and select the “Q1 2026 Earnings Webcast” link in the “Events & Presentations” section.

data.title: illumin Holdings Inc. announces date for first quarter 2026 financial and operating results
data.description: On April 24, 2026, illumin Holdings Inc., a digital advertising technology leader, announced it will release its first quarter financial results for 2026 on May 8, 2026, before the market opens. The company trades on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol ILLM and on the OTCQB market under ILLMF. illumin empowers marketers by providing tools to enhance communication with online consumers.

data.title: Senseonics Announces European Launch of Eversense® 365, The World’s First and Only One Year CGM System
data.description: Sweden has introduced the latest Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) system, with plans to commence launches in Germany, Spain, and Italy in the upcoming weeks. This is part of a gradual rollout strategy to reach a wider market. Keep an eye out for this innovative technology as it expands across Europe.

data.title: JPMorgan Announces Cash Distributions for the JPMorgan ETFs
data.description: On April 24, 2026, J. P. Morgan Asset Management (JPMAM) revealed the April 2026 cash distributions for various JPMorgan ETFs trading on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX). Shareholders recorded on May 1, 2026, will obtain cash distributions on May 7, 2026. The distribution amounts per unit for each ETF were also disclosed by the company.

data.title: Emerita Forms Special Committee, Engages Canaccord Genuity and Confirms Receipt of a Second Unsolicited Offer Letter From Denarius Metals
data.description: Toronto, April 24, 2026 - Emerita Resources Corp. (TSXV: EMO, OTCQX: EMOTF, FSE: LLJA) has established a special committee of independent directors, known as the M&A Committee, in response to an unsolicited offer letter from Denarius Metals Corp. on April 10, 2026, aimed at purchasing all outstanding common shares of Emerita. The M&A Committee will explore strategies to enhance shareholder value, such as pursuing strategic transactions and advancing the current business plan. Emerita has appointed Canaccord Genuity Corp. as its financial advisor in this process. Press releases dated April 13, 2026, and April 21, 2026, provide further information on the matter.
